title: SummarySkill
description: Report produced by `skill-summarizer` for a single `skill` node. Extends `report-base.schema.json`. Stability: experimental — field set may tighten as real summarizer output stabilizes.

whatItDoes.description: One-sentence summary of what the skill accomplishes. REQUIRED.

recipe.description: Ordered steps inferred from the skill body. Optional; empty array when the skill is declarative rather than procedural.

preconditions.description: Conditions that must be true before the skill can run productively.

outputs.description: Artifacts or observable effects the skill produces when it completes successfully.

sideEffects.description: State changes outside the immediate output: files touched, processes spawned, network calls.

relatedNodes.description: `node.path` values the summarizer inferred as related. Feeds `related` links at medium confidence.

qualityNotes.description: Free-form notes: ambiguity in the source, potentially misleading wording, outdated references.
